channel.title: Journal of Pediatric Endocrinology and Metabolism
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Journal of Pediatric Endocrinology and Metabolism

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Ensiyeh Bahadoran, Fatemeh Saffari, Mehrzad Ramezani, Sahar Moghbelinejad DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jpem-2025-frontmatter1

item.title: Osteogenesis imperfecta: shifting paradigms in pathophysiology and care in children
item.description: Article by Ensiyeh Bahadoran, Fatemeh Saffari, Mehrzad Ramezani, Sahar Moghbelinejad DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jpem-2024-0512

item.title: CRH receptor antagonist crinecerfont – a promising new treatment option for patients with congenital adrenal hyperplasia due to 21-hydroxylase deficiency
item.description: Article by Ensiyeh Bahadoran, Fatemeh Saffari, Mehrzad Ramezani, Sahar Moghbelinejad DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jpem-2024-0440

item.title: Age and sex mark clinical differences in the presentation of pediatric type 1 diabetes mellitus
item.description: Article by Ensiyeh Bahadoran, Fatemeh Saffari, Mehrzad Ramezani, Sahar Moghbelinejad DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jpem-2024-0451

item.title: Geographic information system mapping and predictors of glycemic control in children and youth with type 1 diabetes: a study from Western India
item.description: Article by Ensiyeh Bahadoran, Fatemeh Saffari, Mehrzad Ramezani, Sahar Moghbelinejad DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jpem-2024-0401

item.title: Body composition assessment measured via bioelectrical impedance analysis in euthyroid children with newly diagnosed Hashimoto’s thyroiditis
item.description: Article by Ensiyeh Bahadoran, Fatemeh Saffari, Mehrzad Ramezani, Sahar Moghbelinejad DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jpem-2024-0420

item.title: Outcomes of newborns screened for congenital hypothyroidism in Turkey – a single center experience
item.description: Article by Ensiyeh Bahadoran, Fatemeh Saffari, Mehrzad Ramezani, Sahar Moghbelinejad DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jpem-2024-0377

item.title: High yield of congenital hypothyroidism among infants attending Children Hospital, Nairobi, Kenya. Facility based study in the absence of newborn screening
item.description: Article by Ensiyeh Bahadoran, Fatemeh Saffari, Mehrzad Ramezani, Sahar Moghbelinejad DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jpem-2024-0219

item.description: Article by Ensiyeh Bahadoran, Fatemeh Saffari, Mehrzad Ramezani, Sahar Moghbelinejad DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jpem-2024-0409

item.title: Persistent hypoglycemia in congenital syphilis: hyperinsulinemic hypoglycemia with a focal pancreatic lesion
item.description: Article by Ensiyeh Bahadoran, Fatemeh Saffari, Mehrzad Ramezani, Sahar Moghbelinejad DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jpem-2024-0365

item.description: Article by Ensiyeh Bahadoran, Fatemeh Saffari, Mehrzad Ramezani, Sahar Moghbelinejad DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jpem-2024-0356

item.title: A novel de novo missense OTC mutation in an Iranian girl: a case report
item.description: Article by Ensiyeh Bahadoran, Fatemeh Saffari, Mehrzad Ramezani, Sahar Moghbelinejad DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jpem-2024-0315
